Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Continued To Aug-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 502
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, AUG-29-2013: JONATHAN BORNSTEIN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF MC CORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC., WITH MR. SANDERS APPEARING AS A REPRESENTATIVE FOR PLAINTIFF; NATHANIEL PLAYER, ESQ. AND JOSH SCHIEBER, ESQ. OF THE EVICTION DEFENSE COLLABORATIVE APPEAR FOR DEFENDANT MS. LATARSHA WALDRON, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

THE COURT HOLDS AN ADDITIONAL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH PERMISSION OF BOTH COUNSEL AND BOTH SIDES CONTINUE TO HOLD SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS.

4:45 P.M.: THE CAUSE DOES NOT SETTLE. THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER CONTINUED UNTIL FRIDAY, AUGUST 30-2013, AT 9:30 A.M. WHEN SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS CONTINUE.

JUDGE: HON. A.JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-502).

Appearances:
Plaintiff McCormack Baron Ragan is present. Represented by Coltise Saunders.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Latarsha Waldron, Delounde Waldron, and Alana Waldron are present.
Attorney Jessica Yeh representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Michael Lee litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of AUG-26-2013 remains on calendar. (D501)
